Name: Community Mega Sale Event
Description:
For large-scale community, town-wide, and charity garage sale events.

Includes:

* Up to 75 participating homes
* Interactive event map
* Up to 8 photos per home
* Featured event placement
* Printable flyers with QR codes
* Enhanced event branding
* Category filtering
* Priority support
internal_notes (metadata): Ideal for: town-wide sales, large HOAs, flea market weekends, fundraiser events, city events

Name: Neighborhood Garage Sale Event
Description:
Designed for neighborhood-wide garage sale events.

Includes:

* Up to 20 participating homes
* Interactive public map
* Up to 5 photos per home
* Category filtering
* Printable flyer with QR code
* Priority event styling
* Social sharing tools
internal_notes (metadata): This will likely become your MOST POPULAR tier. Ideal for: subdivisions, community groups, churches, schools, annual neighborhood sales

Name: Starter Garage Sale Event
Description:
Perfect for small family or multi-family garage sales.

Includes:

* Up to 5 participating homes
* Interactive public map
* Event page
* Up to 3 photos per home
* Mobile-friendly sharing page
* Social media sharing links
internal_notes (metadata): This is the entry-level plan. Ideal for: families, small streets, first-time users
